primary_sources.relevance: Defines sample-accurate scheduled sound playback, oscillators, analysis, and live MediaStream input.

primary_sources.status: W3C First Public Working Draft, work in progress
primary_sources.relevance: Defines Crypto.getRandomValues used to select challenge slots, frequencies, and nonce.

finding: Replace a single randomized active tone with a multi-symbol frequency-time codeword. Requiring every symbol exactly once, with no matching control-slot or duplicate hits, materially reduces accidental ambient matches and exposes simple replay behavior.
design_implication: Vercel Studio should schedule the complete codeword within the direct user gesture, retain negative-control slots, and accept acoustic evidence only when the full codeword classifier returns codeword_consistent alongside existing render, spectral, and temporal gates.

verification.scope: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical pre-commit source

uncertainty: The collision estimate assumes uniform independent frequency selection and ordered active-slot sampling without replacement.
Browser scheduling jitter, room acoustics, microphone processing, and iPhone Safari behavior were not measured.
A matching codeword does not prove conscious audibility or exclusive browser causation.
falsification_route: Omit, reorder, alter, duplicate, or replay any symbol in a control slot. The classifier must refuse codeword_consistent.
privacy_boundary: Persist challenge metadata and derived detections only. Do not persist raw microphone audio without separate consent and governance.
